title: Mi tío Jacinto
writer: Andrés Laszlo, José Santugini, Max Korner
actors: Pablito Calvo, Antonio Vico, José Marco Davó
plot: Jacinto, a retired bullfighter who lives miserably with his nephew Pepote, receives a letter in which he is informed that, according to an old agreement, he must participate in a mock bullfight that will be celebrated that day in ...
